title: Warmly welcome city leaders to Tianhui Group for research and guidance
contentHtml:
On November 17, Liu Yahong, Executive Vice Mayor of Qinhuangdao Municipal People’s Government,Deputy Secretary-General Pang Yinbao, the "Municipal Entrepreneurship and Dual Services" Office, the Municipal Industry and Information Technology Bureau, the Municipal Development and Reform Commission, the Municipal Foreign Affairs and Commerce Bureau, the Municipal Human Resources and Social Security Bureau, the executive deputy mayor of the Haigang District Government, and the person in charge of the Development Zone Management Committee went to Tianhui Group to conduct an in-depth investigation. Tianhui Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen, President Du Shuang and heads of various departments of the group conducted an in-depth investigationWarm reception.

At the meeting, Vice Mayor Liu Yahong focused on understanding the Tianhui E-commerce Industrial Park and Haojuntong Network Transportation Platform projects under construction by Tianhui Group, and conducted an in-depth discussion on the situation encountered by the company in its current development.During the survey, Vice Mayor Liu Yahong emphasized that it is necessary to further increase assistance, promptly grasp various difficulties encountered in enterprise development, break various bottlenecks and constraints of enterprise development, provide practical measures and solve problems in terms of talent introduction, project construction, etc., and fully support enterprise development and project acceleration.

After the meeting, accompanied by Chairman Zeng Shengwen, the leaders visited the sales department of Tianhui Group.
titleZh: 热烈欢迎市领导到天晖集团进行调研指导工作
contentHtmlZh:
11月17日，秦皇岛市人民政府常务副市长刘亚洪、副秘书长庞印宝、“市双创双服”办、市工信局、市发改委、市外事商务局、市人社局分管负责人以及海港区政府常务副区长、开发区管委会分管负责人一行深入天晖集团调研，天晖集团董事长曾胜文、总裁杜霜及集团各部门负责人进行了热情接待。

会上，刘亚洪副市长对天晖集团在建项目天晖电商产业园及皓俊通网络运输平台项目进行重点了解，并对企业现阶段发展中遇到的情况进行深入探讨。刘亚洪副市长在调研中强调，要进一步加大帮扶力度，及时掌握企业发展中遇到的各类困难问题，破解企业发展的各类瓶颈制约，在人才引进、项目建设等方面出实招、解难题，全力支持企业发展和项目提速。

会后，在董事长曾胜文的陪同下，领导们参观了天晖集团销售部门。
